'''鈭歜-r-n''' ('''barana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lifen|lifen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lifen|lifen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-r-n
|-
! Lemma
| barana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:baranithi|baranithi]] || [[word:baraniji|baraniji]] || [[word:baranishi|baranishi]] || [[word:barani|barani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:baranuthuth|baranuthuth]] || [[word:baranujuj|baranujuj]] || [[word:baranushush|baranushush]] || [[word:baran|baran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:baranuthu|baranuthu]] || [[word:baranuju|baranuju]] || [[word:baranushu|baranushu]] || [[word:baranu|baranu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:baranufuth|baranufuth]] || [[word:baranufuj|baranufuj]] || [[word:baranufush|baranufush]] || [[word:baranuf|baranuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:baranethe|baranethe]] || [[word:baraneje|baraneje]] || [[word:baraneshe|baraneshe]] || [[word:barane|barane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:baranothoth|baranothoth]] || [[word:baranojoj|baranojoj]] || [[word:baranoshosh|baranoshosh]] || [[word:baran|baran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:baranotho|baranotho]] || [[word:baranojo|baranojo]] || [[word:baranosho|baranosho]] || [[word:barano|barano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:baranofoth|baranofoth]] || [[word:baranofoj|baranofoj]] || [[word:baranofosh|baranofosh]] || [[word:baranof|baranof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:baran忙th忙|baran忙th忙]] || [[word:baran忙j忙|baran忙j忙]] || [[word:baran忙sh忙|baran忙sh忙]] || [[word:baran忙|baran忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:baranathath|baranathath]] || [[word:baranajaj|baranajaj]] || [[word:baranashash|baranashash]] || [[word:baran|baran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:baranatha|baranatha]] || [[word:baranaja|baranaja]] || [[word:baranasha|baranasha]] || [[word:barana|barana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:baranafath|baranafath]] || [[word:baranafaj|baranafaj]] || [[word:baranafash|baranafash]] || [[word:baranaf|baranaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:baranasha|baranasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobaranasha|gobaranasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibaranasha|gokibaranasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:baran眉sha|baran眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobarankn眉sha|gobarankn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibaran眉sha|gokibaran眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:baransh毛sha|baransh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobaranksh毛sha|gobaranksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibaransh毛sha|gokibaransh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:baranrosha|baranrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobarankrosha|gobarankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibaranrosha|gokibaranrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:baranmusha|baranmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobarankmusha|gobarankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaranmusha|gokibaranmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:baransherasha|baransherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobaranksherasha|gobaranksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibaransherasha|gokibaransherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:barangasha|barangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobarankngasha|gobarankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibarangasha|gokibarangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:baranyasha|baranyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobarankyasha|gobarankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibaranyasha|gokibaranyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:baranyamasha|baranyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobarankyamasha|gobarankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibaranyamasha|gokibaranyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:baran眉sh毛sha|baran眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobarankn眉sh毛sha|gobarankn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibaran眉sh毛sha|gokibaran眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:baran眉rosha|baran眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobarankn眉rosha|gobarankn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibaran眉rosha|gokibaran眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baran眉musha|baran眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobarankn眉musha|gobarankn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaran眉musha|gokibaran眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:baransh毛n眉sha|baransh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobaranksh毛n眉sha|gobaranksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibaransh毛n眉sha|gokibaransh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:baransh毛rosha|baransh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobaranksh毛rosha|gobaranksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibaransh毛rosha|gokibaransh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baransh毛musha|baransh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobaranksh毛musha|gobaranksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaransh毛musha|gokibaransh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:baranron眉sha|baranron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobarankron眉sha|gobarankron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibaranron眉sha|gokibaranron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:baranrosh毛sha|baranrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobarankrosh毛sha|gobarankrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibaranrosh毛sha|gokibaranrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baranromusha|baranromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobarankromusha|gobarankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaranromusha|gokibaranromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:baranmun眉sha|baranmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobarankmun眉sha|gobarankmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibaranmun眉sha|gokibaranmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:baranmush毛sha|baranmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobarankmush毛sha|gobarankmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibaranmush毛sha|gokibaranmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:baranmurosha|baranmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobarankmurosha|gobarankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibaranmurosha|gokibaranmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:baran|baran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:b忙r忙n|b忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobaran|hobaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hob忙r忙n|hob忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobaran|hohobaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohob忙r忙n|hohob忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉baran|n眉baran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉b忙r忙n|n眉b忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉baran|n眉n眉baran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉b忙r忙n|n眉n眉b忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂baran|n茂baran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂b忙r忙n|n茂b忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂baran|n茂n茂baran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂b忙r忙n|n茂n茂b忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubaran|lubaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lub忙r忙n|lub忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubaran|lulubaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulub忙r忙n|lulub忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libaran|libaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lib忙r忙n|lib忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibaran|lilibaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilib忙r忙n|lilib忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobaran|kobaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kob忙r忙n|kob忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobaran|kokobaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokob忙r忙n|kokob忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebaran|kebaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keb忙r忙n|keb忙r忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebaran|kekebaran]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeb忙r忙n|kekeb忙r忙n]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
